title: tontanea repens
side_effects: Tontanea repens can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. Ingesting large quantities of the plant can also lead to stomach cramps, diarrhea, and vomiting. Additionally, prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause kidney damage and increased heart rate. In severe cases, improper use of tontanea repens can lead to respiratory failure and even death.
